building_row.open_questions: Verify that the exact unit you would lease includes in-unit washer and dryer, confirm current parking pricing, and ask how much rooftop and pool noise carries into the interior courtyard units at night.
building_row.notes: Vantage has some of the stronger operational signals in this set. The official site clearly confirms controlled access, Amazon Hub lockers, EV charging, reserved parking, on-site management, rooftop lounge, pools, and 24-hour fitness, while Apartments.com adds dishwasher and in-unit laundry details plus a visible review history. The main caution is that the building is older and large, the official site says washer and dryer are only in select homes, and the area is still active enough that quiet is a unit-specific question rather than a blanket strength.

evidence_rows.claim: The official site lists access control, reserved parking, Amazon Hub package lockers, heated pools, rooftop lounge, 24-hour fitness, and EV charging stations.
evidence_rows.quote_or_note: Community amenities list includes Access Controlled Community, Reserved Parking, Amazon Hub Package Lockers, Heated Pools, Rooftop Lounge, 24-hour Fitness Center, and EV Charging Stations.

evidence_rows.claim: The official site says apartment amenities include central AC and heat, stainless steel appliances, and washer and dryer in select homes.
evidence_rows.quote_or_note: Apartment amenities section lists Central AC and Heat, Stainless Steel Appliances, and Washer and Dryer in Select Homes.

evidence_rows.claim: The official resident-testimonial page shows a 3.9 out of 5 score based on 1,495 resident testimonials, with recent praise for leasing and maintenance staff.
evidence_rows.quote_or_note: Testimonials page says 3.9/5 from 1,495 resident testimonials; recent reviewed entries mention helpful office staff and prompt maintenance.

evidence_rows.claim: Apartments.com shows a 4.5 blended score with 14 renter reviews and manager responses.
evidence_rows.quote_or_note: Property ratings section shows 4.5 out of 5 with 14 renter reviews and visible property manager responses.

evidence_rows.claim: Apartments.com corroborates controlled access, property manager on site, washer and dryer, air conditioning, and dishwasher.
evidence_rows.quote_or_note: Community amenities list Controlled Access and Property Manager on Site; apartment features list Washer/Dryer, Air Conditioning, and Dishwasher.

evidence_rows.claim: Apartments.com gives Vantage an Active SoundScore of 70 with busy traffic, indicating noticeable but potentially manageable area noise.
evidence_rows.quote_or_note: SoundScore section shows 70/100 with Traffic Busy and Businesses Active, which is better than the most exposed Santa Monica and Sunset frontage buildings but not truly quiet.

evidence_rows.claim: Trulia discloses current base rents, cat and dog rent, and pet deposits, while also warning that displayed prices may exclude additional fees.
evidence_rows.quote_or_note: Trulia lists base rent, cat rent $45, dog rent $55, cat deposit $500, dog deposit $500, and notes that additional costs and fees may apply.

evidence_rows.claim: Birdeye shows a broad 4.2 out of 5 score across 241 reviews, but the visible review sample also includes an older severe complaint about trash-room conditions and leasing-office indifference.
evidence_rows.quote_or_note: Birdeye summary shows 4.2 stars from 241 reviews, but one visible older Facebook review alleges roaches in hallways and poor disclosure from leasing.

packet_markdown:
# Vantage Hollywood building packet

## Snapshot
- Building ID: vantage-hollywood-1710-n-fuller-ave
- Address: 1710 N Fuller Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90046
- Primary URL: https://www.equityapartments.com/los-angeles/west-hollywood/vantage-apartments
- Management company: Equity Residential / Equity Apartments
- Recommended status: tour_candidate
- Last updated: 2026-03-25

## Scorecard
- Quiet: 3 (medium, evidence count 3)
- Management: 4 (medium, evidence count 4)
- Amenity: 5 (medium, evidence count 7)
- Community stability: 4 (medium, evidence count 4)
- Location fit: 5
- Pricing transparency: 3

## Risks
- Structural noise risk: medium
- Location noise risk: medium
- Security risk: low
- Pricing risk: medium

## Evidence summary
- [official] Official site clearly lists access control, reserved parking, Amazon Hub package lockers, heated pools, rooftop lounge, 24-hour fitness center, and EV charging. Source: Equity Apartments official site (https://www.equityapartments.com/los-angeles/west-hollywood/vantage-apartments). Note: stronger operational disclosure than average.
- [official] Official site lists central AC and heat, stainless steel appliances, and washer/dryer in select homes. Source: Equity Apartments official site (https://www.equityapartments.com/los-angeles/west-hollywood/vantage-apartments). Note: exact unit still needs washer/dryer confirmation.
- [official] Equity testimonial page shows 3.9/5 from 1,495 resident testimonials, with recent praise for helpful leasing and prompt maintenance staff. Source: Equity Apartments testimonials page (https://www.equityapartments.com/los-angeles/west-hollywood/vantage-apartments-reviews). Note: useful but still first-party.
- [review] Apartments.com shows 4.5 blended score with 14 renter reviews and manager responses. Source: Apartments.com (https://www.apartments.com/vantage-hollywood-los-angeles-ca/x94e5mp/). Note: good external corroboration for management quality.
- [review] Apartments.com confirms controlled access, property manager on site, washer/dryer, air conditioning, and dishwasher. Source: Apartments.com (https://www.apartments.com/vantage-hollywood-los-angeles-ca/x94e5mp/). Note: good match for your required essentials.
- [review] Apartments.com gives the building an Active SoundScore of 70 with busy traffic. Source: Apartments.com (https://www.apartments.com/vantage-hollywood-los-angeles-ca/x94e5mp/). Note: likely manageable but not whisper-quiet.
- [review] Trulia publishes current pet rents and deposits but warns additional fees may apply. Source: Trulia (https://www.trulia.com/building/vantage-hollywood-1710-n-fuller-ave-los-angeles-ca-90046-1001579622). Note: better than average fee clarity, but parking pricing is still not fully public.
- [review] Birdeye shows a strong overall rating but also an older severe complaint about trash-room and pest conditions. Source: Birdeye (https://reviews.birdeye.com/vantage-hollywood-apartments-156799630348894). Note: enough friction to keep management confidence at medium rather than high.

## Open questions
- Verify that the exact unit you would lease includes in-unit washer and dryer, confirm current parking pricing, and ask how much rooftop and pool noise carries into the interior courtyard units at night.

## Notes
Vantage is one of the more credible tour candidates so far because operations, package handling, access control, and day-to-day amenities are better documented than most peers. The tradeoff is that this is still a large Hollywood building with active surroundings, so quiet depends heavily on unit placement.
